LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT THE INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 9, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 SO THAT THE COURT CAN RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302 BY 4PM JULY 2 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HERING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS AS WELL AS THE PAPERS FILED ON JUNE 15 AND JUNE 22. NO FURTHER FILINGS ARE PERMITTED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-29-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT THE INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE COVERAGE SOUGHT IS ENCOMPASSED WITHIN THE INSURING LANGUAGE OF THE PARTIES' INSURANCE CONTRACTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
W. David Campagne, Esq., from Sinnott, Puebla, Campagne & Curet, 415-352-6200, for defendant and moving party
Jordan S. Stanzler, Esq., from Stanzler Law Group, 650-739-0200, for plaintiff and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled. The coverage sought is encompassed within the insuring language of the parties' insurance contracts. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Continued To Jul-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE STATE OF PENNSYLVANIA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 9, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 so that the court can receive courtesy copies of the moving papers. Courtesy copies of the moving papers must be delivered to Dept. 302 by 4pm July 2 with a cover letter stating the new hering date. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers as well as the papers filed on June 15 and June 22. No further filings are permitted. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
